app.title: Therapist Finder
app.tagline: Parse therapist data and generate personalized emails
app.footer: Therapist Finder — Made for finding the right therapist
lang.label: Language
step1.heading: Load therapists from a PDF
step1.urlHint: Paste the link to a Psych-Info "Resultate" PDF. We'll fetch and parse it on the server, then show the ranked list of therapists in the next step.
step1.toggleUploadLink: Upload a PDF / text file instead
step1.dropzoneText: Drag & drop your PDF or text file here
step1.statusInvalidFile: Please select a PDF or text file
step1.statusFetchFailed: Failed to load PDF. Please check the URL and try again.
step1.statusUploadFailed: Failed to parse file. Please try again.
step2.heading: Overview
step3.heading: Your information
step4.heading: Mail template
step4.bodyHint: Use <ANREDE> as the salutation placeholder. Curly-brace placeholders like {name}, {telefon}, {email}, {vermittlungscode} are replaced with your info.
step4.statusGenerateFailed: Failed to generate emails. Please try again.
step4.languageNotice: The default template is in German because emails are sent to German-speaking therapists. The UI language only affects this interface.
step5.heading: Contact therapist
step5.truncationWarning: ⚠️ This email is long and may be cut off when your mail app opens it. Use Copy body to paste the full text into the compose window.
step5.statusNoDrafts: No drafts available. Go back and generate emails first.
step5.statusAllContacted: All therapists from this list were already contacted. Clear your browser storage to start over.
step5.statusMailOpened: Mail app opened. Click Next when ready for the next therapist.
step5.statusClipboardFailed: Could not access clipboard. Select the text in the preview and copy manually.
